历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9963, 11145, 19272, 14906, and 14473 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant fluctuation due to batch adjustments, but the rankings have stabilized around 14500 in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 14473. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 123 in 2021, 130 in 2022, 129 in 2023, 135 in 2024, and 128 in 2025. For 2026, the total is 128 (101 for Physics Category plus 27 for Medical Category), unchanged from 2025, with no change in total plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 74th, with a stable ranking between 69 and 78 in recent years, placing it among the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, mainly due to the men's volleyball team winning the CUVA University Volleyball League championship, which increased attention. Its Douyin popularity ranks 43rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting a rise in application interest. No significant gaps in admission have been recorded. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Food Quality and Safety, which attracts some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity. The total number of Gaokao candidates in the province for 2026 is 167,000, with an estimated 114,000 in Physics Category (about 68.2% of total), a slight decrease of about 3% from 117,000 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in recent two years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the relatively positive university reputation with increased Douyin attention, and a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in the province, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 14473. The predicted minimum ranking is about 14423, with a range of 13923 to 14923.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University's medical programs in Heilongjiang Province over the past five years are: 9792 in 2021, 10913 in 2022, 13415 in 2023, 27762 in 2024, and 23358 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 17 students in 2021, expanded to 27 in 2022, reduced to 20 in 2023, increased to 25 in 2024, and maintained at 25 in 2025. The 2026 plan further expands to 27 students, an increase of 2, with an expansion rate of about 8%. The expansion has a certain downward effect on rankings, but medical programs overall have high application enthusiasm, limiting the mitigating effect of the expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key construction university under the national 211 Project and also a national Double First-Class construction university, with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical department has a long history, and majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology have high recognition in the region, continuously attracting candidates from Heilongjiang Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the application enthusiasm for medical majors has been rising, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province. Although not a first-tier city, as the medical department of the only 211 university in the province, it still has strong appeal to out-of-province candidates. The enrollment scale for medical programs in Heilongjiang Province is relatively limited, with 27 students planned for 2026, resulting in a generally tight supply-demand relationship.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the favorable factor of expanding by 2 students (+8%) in 2026, the trend of rankings recovering significantly from the 2024 peak in 2025, and the persistently high market environment for medical programs, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in 2026 will be approximately 24279, slightly lower (easier to enter) than in 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 23779 and 24779.
